LAW AND MOTION 301,PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISSING ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISSING ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT ENTERED MAY 31, 2019, IS VACATED AND SET ASIDE. THE MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (301/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of And Motion For Order Setting Aside Judgment And Dismissing Entire Action With Prejudice
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Order Setting Aside Judgment And Dismissing Entire Action With Prejudice.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.'s Motion For Order Setting Aside Judgment And Dismissing Entire Action With Prejudice, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. The judgment entered May 31, 2019, is vacated and set aside. The matter is dismissed with prejudice.

Plaintiff must file a proposed order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
